'''Rodis''' was a primitive and war-torn<ref name="DB" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located in the [[Rodis system/Legends|Rodis system]] of the [[Sugai sector/Legends|Sugai sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> one of the [[Sector/Legends|subsectors]] making up the [[Outer Zuma]] region<ref name="OuterZuma" /> within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Zuma sector/Legends|Zuma sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Rodisar]] [[Species/Legends|species]], members of which waged seasonal<ref name="CSWE" /> [[winter wars]].<ref name="DB" />

[[Nilo (Rodisar)|Nilo]] was a Rodisar from Rodis who climbed the corrupt [[Military rank/Legends|military ranks]] of his homeworld by bribing [[Politics/Legends|politicians]], eventually attaining the rank of [[General/Legends|general]].<ref name="DB" /> At some point by [[22 BBY/Legends|21.95 BBY]],<ref name="Date">[[Nilo (Rodisar)|Nilo]] is on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]] during the events of {{CW|6}}. Those events also include [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] receiving her [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Asajj Ventress's lightsabers/Legends|lightsabers]]. Ventress later [[Duel on Yavin 4|duels]] the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] with those [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] in "[[Chapter 17 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 17]]," and ''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]'' states that Skywalker was promoted to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] from the rank of Padawan four [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], which occurred in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Therefore, "Chapter 6" took place at some point by four weeks after the Battle of Geonosis. Since ''The New Essential Chronology'' confirms one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the battle to be 21.95 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], and ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' states that one month was seven weeks, the episode can be further specified to have taken place by 21.95 BBY.</ref> [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] [[Slaver/Legends|enslavers]] kidnapped Nilo and his command staff, and the general was ultimately [[Slavery/Legends|sold]] to [[Baron/Legends|war barons]] on<ref name="DB" /> the planet [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Rodis was first mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for the character Nilo, which had been published at some point by [[December 17]], [[2003]]. The character and the planet were named as an [[Tuckerization|allusion]] to the name of ''[[Star Wars]]'' concept artist [[Nilo Rodis-Jamero]].<ref name="DB" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Rodis [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet, in grid square H-16.<ref name="TEA Rodis" />
